note: Leave-one-run-family-out split must keep train/test runs disjoint.
Current models use residualized numeric waveform/latent summaries only; identifiers and nuisance labels are excluded.
Flag if residualized CWoLa nearly identifies current labels.
Flag if matched nuisance bins alone still classify current too well.
Flag if shuffled-label model transfers current information.
